__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus datasource for CrowdSec bouncer metrics

description: Monitoring dashboard for cs-routeros-bouncer — CrowdSec remediation component for MikroTik RouterOS

panels.description: Real-time RouterOS API connection status. Green=connected, Red=disconnected.
panels.title: RouterOS Connected

panels.description: Number of currently active IPv4 ban decisions enforced on the router.
panels.title: Active Decisions (IPv4)

panels.description: Number of currently active IPv6 ban decisions enforced on the router.
panels.title: Active Decisions (IPv6)

panels.description: Total active decisions across both IPv4 and IPv6 address lists.
panels.title: Total Active Decisions

panels.description: Distribution of active ban decisions between IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.
panels.title: IPv4 / IPv6 Ratio

panels.description: Time elapsed since the bouncer process started.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Bouncer version, build info, and connected RouterOS device identity.
panels.title: Bouncer Info

panels.description: Live RouterOS hardware metrics: CPU load (%), memory usage (%), and CPU temperature (°C).
panels.title: RouterOS System

panels.description: Historical CPU load across all router cores over time.
panels.title: CPU Load Over Time

panels.description: Historical memory usage of the router over time with threshold lines.
panels.title: Memory Usage Over Time

panels.description: Historical CPU temperature of the router over time with threshold lines.
panels.title: CPU Temperature Over Time

panels.description: RouterOS device uptime, directly from the router system resources.
panels.title: RouterOS Uptime

panels.description: RouterOS hardware model and firmware version.
panels.title: RouterOS Info

panels.description: Active firewall decisions tracked over time, split by IP version.
panels.title: Active Decisions Over Time

panels.description: Running total of all decisions processed since bouncer startup.
panels.title: Cumulative Decisions

panels.description: Rate of ban/unban decisions processed per second.
panels.title: Decisions Processed (Rate)

panels.description: Active decision count grouped by origin (CrowdSec, cscli, CAPI).
panels.title: Active Decisions by Origin

panels.description: Decision processing rate per second grouped by origin.
panels.title: Decisions by Origin (Rate)

panels.description: Running total of decisions grouped by origin source.
panels.title: Cumulative Decisions by Origin

panels.description: Total bytes evaluated by bouncer firewall rules (passthrough counting rules).
panels.title: Processed Bytes

panels.description: Total packets evaluated by bouncer firewall rules (passthrough counting rules).
panels.title: Processed Packets

panels.description: Total bytes dropped by bouncer-created firewall rules.
panels.title: Dropped Bytes

panels.description: Total packets dropped by bouncer-created firewall rules.
panels.title: Dropped Packets

panels.description: Percentage of evaluated traffic that is being dropped by CrowdSec rules.
panels.title: Drop Rate

panels.description: Rate of traffic evaluated by CrowdSec firewall rules (bytes/s and packets/s).
panels.title: Processed Traffic Rate

panels.description: Rate of traffic dropped by CrowdSec firewall rules (bytes/s and packets/s).
panels.title: Dropped Traffic Rate

panels.description: Processed (evaluated) traffic breakdown by protocol (IPv4 vs IPv6), showing bytes and packets per second.
panels.title: Processed Traffic by Protocol (Rate)

panels.description: Dropped traffic breakdown by protocol (IPv4 vs IPv6), showing bytes and packets per second.
panels.title: Dropped Traffic by Protocol (Rate)

panels.description: Total traffic volume evaluated by CrowdSec firewall rules over time.
panels.title: Processed Traffic (Cumulative)

panels.description: Percentage of traffic being dropped over time — the most meaningful dropped vs processed comparison metric.
panels.title: Drop Rate Over Time

panels.description: Error rate per second categorized by error type (API, connection, parse).
panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: Timeline showing RouterOS connection state history (connected/disconnected).
panels.title: RouterOS Connection

panels.description: Duration of the most recent reconciliation operation.
panels.title: Reconciliation Duration

panels.description: Time elapsed since the last successful reconciliation cycle.
panels.title: Last Reconciliation

panels.description: Total cumulative errors since bouncer startup.
panels.title: Total Errors

panels.description: Operation latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99) for add, remove, and reconcile operations.
panels.title: Operation Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)

panels.description: Rate of firewall operations per second by type.
panels.title: Operation Rate

panels.description: Go process resident memory (RSS) and heap allocation.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Go process CPU usage percentage.
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Active goroutines and open file descriptors in the Go runtime.
panels.title: Goroutines & File Descriptors

panels.description: Complete bouncer configuration parameters grouped by category with color-coded groups.
panels.title: Bouncer Configuration

title: CrowdSec RouterOS Bouncer
